title: Tubtrugs 14L Small Flexible 2-Handled Recycled Tub, Pistachio
description: From the manufacturer Red Gorilla Flexible Plastic Tub, Toy Storage, Laundry, Gardening & More The Gorilla Tub is a flexible tub that is built to last! It is perfect for use around the home, in the garden and at the stables. Our Small Gorilla Tub holds approximately 3.7 gallons and is perfectly sized for small tasks and ideally suited for use by children as a play toy, organizer or trip to the beach. The Medium Gorilla Tub holds almost 7 gallons and is perfectly sized for carrying liquids and is very well suited for bending under sink spouts to act as a plant waterer or cleaning agent container. The Large Gorilla Tub holds approximately10 gallons and is perfectly sized to handle the smallest chores right on up to what most adults can comfortably carry. Flex it flat to sweep into, mix potting soils, carry water, beverages and ice on the deck, or toss it to the kids and have them clean up their room. Benefits of Red Gorilla Plastic Storage Tubs Available in Multiple Sizes & Colors Multiple Uses Flexible & Strong Frost & UV Resistant
